chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI JCM No. 38 of 2010 _____________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of Main Petition. 22.04.2026. None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Abdul Munam, Advocate for Respondent.......... None has appeared on behalf of the Petitioner, nor has any intimation been received. A perusal of the Order Sheet reveals that there is a repeated absence by the Petitioners, which shows that they have lost interest in pursuing the matter. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ayaz
